name: digital-marketing-pro
description: End-to-end digital marketing engagement methodology for Claude Code & Cowork. v3.3 modernizes the May 2026 reality across privacy/compliance (EU AI Act Article 50 enforcement 2 Aug 2026, DPDP Phase II Nov 2026, NY synthetic-performer law June 2026, FTC May 2026 endorsement guidance, CCPA ADMT, CJEU pseudonymization ruling), channel mechanics (LinkedIn March 2026 algo + Depth Score, email DMARC + RFC 8058 + open-rate decline, TikTok USDS Joint Venture + AI creator labeling, WhatsApp per-message pricing, schema refresh with LLMs.txt + entity-rich JSON-LD, Sora deprecation note), and AEO/GEO (Google AI Overviews + zero-click reality, Profound/Otterly/Conductor measurement integration). README restructured Quick Start-first with install + auto-update toggle as steps 1-2, 'Where files go' section, version histories collapsed at the bottom. Top Commands table corrected to use /digital-marketing-pro: prefix. v3.2 closes the v3.1 hook-removal gaps with /digital-marketing-pro:check, /digital-marketing-pro:status, embedded hallucination checks, opt-in auto_save_insights flag. v3.0 introduced the 12-Part Strategy Flow producing the Four Core Documents (61 explicit steps), Two-Views Model, Decision Matrix, Update-Back Rule, Living Project Instruction File. 25 specialist agents, 149 skills, 70 Python scripts, 10 top-level commands, 14 HTTP MCP connectors, 16 industry profiles, 16 privacy-law jurisdictions.
